name: golang-golang-x-arch-dev
title: golang-golang-x-arch-dev
description:
Library with machine architecture information
This library holds machine architecture information used by the Go
toolchain. It supports the arm, arm64, ppc64 and x86 architectures. It mostly
includes functions for decoding assembly instructions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-arch-dev because Library with machine architecture information.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-arch-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-arch-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-arch-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
